rationale.R1.2: The draft contains a material internal contradiction: the system is defined as 'buffer-free' and 'validation-set-free', yet the proof sketch explicitly references 'the empirical gradient computed from the validation buffer'. Logical consistency repair is central to improving this draft.
rationale.R1.3: Three quantitative empirical claims are made (38% cost reduction, 17% vs. BERT-router, within 1% quality delta) with a causal attribution ('strength of these results follows directly from…'). Improving the draft requires checking whether those claims are properly scoped, hedged, and grounded rather than asserted.
